However, this is a standard feature of such factory classes, and the risk is minimal if users connect only to trusted addresses.\n\n- The code's purpose is purely to interface with known, read-only functions. No input handling or external data processing is involved that could introduce vulnerabilities.\n\n---\n\n### Final assessment:\n- **Malware score:** Should remain **0**.\n- **Obfuscated score:** Should remain **0**.\n- **Risk score:** Given the nature of the code, a very low score (e.g., 0.1) is appropriate, which is already reflected.\n\n---\n\n### **Summary of my own estimate:**\n- **Malware:** 0  \n- **Obfuscated:** 0  \n- **Risk:** 0.1 (consistent with current scores)  \n\n**Conclusion:**  \nThe reports are accurate, and the code is safe.
